Shantanu Kallakuri  
New Edit Delete History

    Hello world, thanks for visiting! I'm Shantanu Kallakuri and this page is my personal website, where I love to write on various topics. I also run and operate - Chemystery.org. These sites are a personal endeavor dedicated to popularizing easy science with emphasis on Materials Chemistry and their incredible applications in nature. After all, Chemistry's what makes for a great cup of coffee and some classy romance! Let's dive right in:
